summary: Vertical video. Continuous daytime coverage of Trump's farewell at Beijing Capital Airport: he walks past Chinese officials and a line of greeters waving flags and boards the steps to Air Force One, shot over a limousine in the foreground in a single real-time sequence. The transcript is empty. There is no title card, color grading, montage cutting, or added styling, only a continuous ceremony and departure recording.
notable_text: tweet: '.@POTUS bids farewell to Chinese officials at Beijing Capital Airport as he concludes his historic state visit to China'
